goal: Move global navigation into a top-left 'Все функции' dropdown, reuse the left sidebar for a dedicated sidebar AI chat session, and expose safe current window context through ui.get_current_context.
global_constraints: Do not introduce a universal event bus/event store in the MVP.
Use PageContextEnvelope as a server-side current-window snapshot, not as a full prompt payload on every message.
Bind an immutable context_snapshot_id to each sidebar chat message/request at submit time.
ui.get_current_context must read the bound snapshot, not the latest window snapshot.
Expose current UI context through a read-only ui.get_current_context tool.
Sidebar chat uses a dedicated sidebar session, separate from ordinary full-page chat sessions.
Sidebar history must be compacted by keeping the last N messages and summarizing older messages.
AI chat settings must use one shared ai.chat_settings runtime contract for full_page and sidebar surfaces.
Resolve effective settings through defaults plus surfaces.<surface> overrides.
Sidebar N is configurable through surfaces.sidebar.recent_message_limit and defaults to 8.
The sidebar shows only the current sidebar session; compact session switching remains a full chat page concern.
No UI for viewing or regenerating sidebar_summary is required in the MVP.
Favorites remain in the header.
The left sidebar must support pinned and collapsed modes.
Never trust client-provided object data; resolve selected objects server-side through domain selectors/source adapters.
Never trust client-provided capabilities; recompute capabilities server-side.
Do not send raw HTML, secrets or PII from the page to the AI runtime.
Treat sidebar_summary as sensitive runtime state; do not send it to memory or raw audit logs automatically.
Keep write tools behind the existing confirmation flow.
Keep the full chat page available.
Avoid duplicating chat logic; extract reusable chat surface behavior where practical.
Preserve existing navigation visibility rules.
Temporary artifacts belong in .local/.
Update docs and PROJECT_STRUCTURE.yaml after structural changes.
cross_cutting_acceptance: The sidebar chat works as a dedicated sidebar session without breaking the full-page chat.
Sidebar compaction keeps the configured number of recent messages and stores a safe summary for older messages.
The selected workorder in the right drawer is visible to the chat as safe context.
The context used by a chat response remains the snapshot bound to that message even if the user changes cards immediately after submitting.
The AI uses ui.get_current_context for context-dependent turns.
Server-side permissions are enforced for resolved page context.
Expired window context snapshots are cleaned up.
The implementation is covered by unit tests and an e2e scenario.
implementation_notes: Create contracts/ai/chat_settings.json and data/contracts/ai/chat_settings.json support with defaults and surfaces.full_page/sidebar overrides.
Create the Settings Center descriptor ai.contract.chat_settings for the shared AI chat settings contract.
Add get_chat_settings(surface) helper and use it from both full-page and sidebar chat paths.
Create AIWindowContextSnapshot model or equivalent versioned storage with cleanup.
Pinned/collapsed sidebar state remains browser localStorage, not a server contract setting.
No sidebar session switcher and no sidebar_summary regeneration UI in the MVP.
Browser context updates must debounce and send only changed context hashes.
deferred_decisions: Whether later event platform should store UI events, domain events, or both.
